story.text:
# 🚪 Bonfires (sister)
**gateway** · shared · narrative

Sister city · external Bonfires platform (bonfires.ai). The community-discovery flame; the first-person scene of Soulbae meeting socrat0x at one of plat0x's Bonfires. Internal name 'Dragon Bonfire' is the in-city quarter; this gateway is the external partner.

## Edges in

- [[City of Mages]] *gateway_to* →
- [[City of Mages]] *kin_to* →
